title: pterophylla negrosensis
intro: Pterophylla negrosensis, also known as the Negros fern, is a type of plant native to the Philippines, specifically found in the island of Negros. It is a medicinal plant that has been used traditionally to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The Negros fern is rich in flavonoids and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties and provide several health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and improving immune function. In herbal preparations, the Negros fern is often used as a decoction or infusion, and can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
